translations.description: One entry per source paragraph, in the order the paragraphs were enumerated in the prompt.

sequence.description: 1-based index of the source paragraph as numbered in the prompt. The loader maps it back to the corpus (page_index, sequence).

text.description: Translation of that paragraph into the target language. The ONLY field that is not in English.

category.description: Exactly one category per letter. 'no_alert' when nothing is wrong. Secondary issues go inline in 'reason'. 'safety_filter_triggered' is never chosen by the model — the runner synthesizes it on an API refusal; it stays in the enum so this list equals categories.json.

reason.description: Short English justification for the category. For 'no_alert', a brief 'No issue detected.'
